meta.title: DEF CON 32 Trailer
meta.description: DEF CON 32! The most influential hacker convention in the world. August 8-11, Las Vegas Convention Center. Online registration available until August 1 at shop.defcon.org. Otherwise, tickets can be purchased for cash at the door.
